overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing the protagonist Aloy exploring a tropical tribal village at sunset. The character walks along wooden pathways past thatched structures and dense vegetation, transitioning from an open-air settlement into a large covered temple-like structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: tropical tribal village with elevated wooden walkways

events.description: character turns right around the great tree structure and proceeds along wooden walkway

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the village outskirts, circling a large tree structure with hanging ornaments

entered.detail: massive organic tree structure with thick trunk and hanging clay pots
elevated bamboo and wood plank pathway with moss growth
tall tribal tower with conical thatched roof
bamboo pole fencing lining the pathway
distant snow-capped peaks visible against pink sky

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with Aloy circling a massive tree structure adorned with hanging clay pots in a tropical village setting. She walks along elevated wooden pathways bordered by bamboo fencing, with a distinctive thatched watchtower visible in the distance. The golden hour lighting casts warm tones across the scene as distant mountains loom against a pink sunset sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: village thoroughfare leading to temple entrance

events.description: passes through wooden archway marking entrance to inner village area
approaching shadow of large structure causes gradual dimming of natural light

agents.ego_description: walking purposefully toward a large arched entrance, passing through the village center

notable_agents.action: villager standing near archway entrance, observing the surroundings

entered.detail: large woven bamboo archway marking transition to inner village
massive stone and wood structure entrance with carved details

segments.scene_description: Aloy proceeds along wooden walkways through the village center, approaching a large thatched archway. A villager stands near the entrance as the character moves toward a massive stone structure. The environment remains sunlit but transitions from open village to the threshold of a covered temple area, with dense tropical vegetation and bamboo fencing lining the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: interior of great temple with woven architecture

events.description: enters the dark interior of the massive structure, transitioning from outdoor to indoor environment
interior artificial lights become the primary illumination source as natural light fades completely

agents.ego_description: ascending stone steps into the cavernous interior, examining the woven architectural details

entered.detail: intricately woven bamboo and vine walls forming a tunnel-like passage
warm glowing lanterns mounted on walls providing interior illumination
large cavernous space with high woven ceiling and stone floors

segments.scene_description: The character enters the massive structure, transitioning from the golden hour exterior to a dimly lit interior with woven bamboo walls and stone floors. Artificial lanterns provide warm illumination as Aloy ascends steps into a cavernous chamber with intricate tribal architecture. The environment shifts completely from open tropical village to enclosed sacred space with detailed woven textures overhead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sun-drenched tropical village that gradually transitions into the dim, enclosed interior of a sacred tribal temple. It begins with Aloy circling a massive tree adorned with clay pots, moving along elevated wooden pathways and bamboo fencing under a pink sunset sky. As she proceeds through the village center, the open landscape narrows toward a large thatched archway and a massive stone structure, with the golden hour light lingering on the surrounding tropical vegetation. The scene then shifts as the character crosses the threshold, moving from the bright exterior into a dimly lit interior characterized by stone floors and woven bamboo walls. Finally, the camera ascends steps into a cavernous chamber where artificial lanterns replace the sunlight, completing the transition from the open settlement to an enclosed space of intricate tribal architecture.
